creator: theron.tarigo@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Michael from comment #5)

It's unclear what bug you are trying to report.  A port doesn't build?  The port does build but a supported GPU is not working?  The forums or mailing lists may be a better place to ask for support, if there isn't a bug per-se.  Otherwise you should share the failed *port* build output, or if it is not a build problem, dmesg after a supported GPU fails to init.  Note that presence of absence of a supported GPU has no effect on port build success.

Latest FreeBSD nvidia-driver-390 is version 390.151, supported products here:
https://www.nvidia.com/download/driverResults.aspx/188605/en-us/
Seems to cover the whole range of GT7xx.
